title: taraxacum frisicum
intro: Taraxacum frisicum, commonly known as the Dutch dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum frisicum include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salads and as a culinary ingredient.
